---
title: "Appendix"
author: "ibdj"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Current climate conditions

All climatic variables are calculated based on 2008 – 2022 data, as these are the year where full year data is available. Data available from GEM. (2020). ClimateBasis Nuuk—Temperature—Air temperature \@ 200 cm—30min average (°C) (Version 1.0) \[Dataset\]. Greenland Ecosystem Monitoring. <https://doi.org/10.17897/PGN3-7597>

## Tempterature

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
